creator: e94pasch@yahoo.com
text:
@Franco, would you be able to help to find the file equivalent to /etc/rc.conf on regular Freebsd on opnsense?

I also tried to execute a NAT speed test but failed unfortunately. 
@Franco do you have any pointers here i was not able to do iperf through firewall, something was still blocking. Perhaps in a separate discussion in opnsense forums?
Thanks!

Dunno if helpful here is kldstat result:
